positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

% SZS output start Proof for pos
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]

7. (contains_only_one_element(mixture) | contains_carbon(mixture)) => (~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~alkane(mixture)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~((contains_only_one_element(mixture) | contains_carbon(mixture)) => (~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~alkane(mixture))) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~(~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~alkane(mixture)) [pure predicate removal 8]
11. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
12. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
14. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
15. chemical_compound(mixture) | alkane(mixture) [ennf transformation 9]
16. (chemical_compound(mixture) | ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)) & (contains_only_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture)) [nnf transformation 6]
17. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
18. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. contains_only_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture) [cnf transformation 16]
23. chemical_compound(mixture) | alkane(mixture) [cnf transformation 15]
25. 1 <=> alkane(mixture) [avatar definition]
27. alkane(mixture) <- (1) [avatar component clause 25]
29. 2 <=> chemical_compound(mixture) [avatar definition]
30. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 29]
31. chemical_compound(mixture) <- (2) [avatar component clause 29]
32. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 23,29,25]
34. 3 <=> contains_only_one_element(mixture) [avatar definition]
36. contains_only_one_element(mixture) <- (3) [avatar component clause 34]
37. ~2 | 3 [avatar split clause 21,34,29]
39. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (3) [resolution 20,36]
40. $false <- (2, 3) [forward subsumption resolution 39,31]
41. ~2 | ~3 [avatar contradiction clause 40]
42. hydrocarbon(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 27,18]
43. organic_compound(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 42,17]
44. chemical_compound(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 43,19]
45. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 44,30]
46. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 45]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 32]
s2. ~2 | 3 [sat_conversion 37]
s4. ~3 | ~2 [sat_conversion 41]
s5. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 46]

s7. ~1 [rat s5,s6]
s9. # [rat s1,s6,s7]
47. $false [avatar sat refutation s9]

% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u29,negated_conjecture,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
